expectations.evidence: Uses '.claude/hooks.json' instead of the correct '.claude/settings.json'. Config structure also differs from actual Claude Code format (missing 'matcher' and 'type' fields).
Uses invented commands like 'agent-heart hook lock', 'agent-heart hook beat', 'agent-heart hook unlock' instead of the actual 'npx agent-heart hook claude-code --event pre-tool-use' syntax.
Provides a /loop command for checking stale/dead runs every 2 minutes
Mentions SessionStart and SessionEnd hooks with lock/unlock for session tracking
